common.webresearchTooltip: This description was supplemented with web research as the official sourcebooks did not provide sufficient information. Details may be inaccurate.

landing.subtitle: Character manager & session tracker for AD&D 2nd Edition.
landing.featureCharacterDesc: Build heroes with the guided wizard or import existing sheets from a photo. Abilities, spells, equipment and epic items — all in one view.
landing.featureSessionDesc: Log adventures, award XP, capture NPCs and memorable quotes — voice notes included for on-the-go entries.
landing.featureChatDesc: Ask the assistant anything about AD&D 2e. Answers come straight from the official books, including Monstrous Manual tactics.
landing.featureGmDesc: A PIN-gated GM dashboard with realtime party overview, loot distribution, monster bestiary and combat simulator.
landing.howItWorksTitle: How to strike the first spark
landing.step1Desc: One email, one one-time code — no passwords, no friction.
landing.step2Desc: Pick race, class, alignment. Roll real stats or import an existing sheet.
landing.step3Desc: Open Play Mode, run the session with your group — stats, spells and loot always at hand.
landing.footerSubtitle: No setup, no downloads. Sign in and begin.

login.title: Welcome, Adventurer
login.description: Sign in with your email — we'll send you a verification code.
login.enterCode: Enter the verification code we sent to {email}.
login.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
login.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Please create .env.local with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

notFound.message: This page was swallowed by the depths of the dungeon.

characters.title: Your Characters
characters.noCharacters: No characters created yet. Time to forge your legend!
characters.deleteMessage: Do you really want to permanently delete "{name}"?
characters.characterChoice: What would you like to do?
characters.manageCharacterDesc: Edit attributes, equipment, spells, and proficiencies.
characters.viewCharacterDesc: View attributes, equipment, spells, and proficiencies.
characters.playCharacterDesc: Session-optimized view for combat, spells, and checks.
characters.newCharacterChoice: How would you like to create your character?
characters.createManuallyDesc: Create a new character step by step using the wizard.
characters.importCharacterDesc: Scan an existing character sheet from a photo or PDF.
characters.epicEquipmentDesc: Manage unique items and their effects.

wizard.levelHint: Characters can be created at any level (1-20).
wizard.alignmentWarning: Warning: This alignment violates the official AD&D 2e rules for the chosen class.
wizard.exceptionalStrHint: Only for warrior classes with STR 18. Value 1-100 (100 = "18/00").
wizard.combatHint: Combat values are calculated automatically. Only enter hit points.
wizard.kitDescription: Optionally choose a kit for your character. Kits modify abilities and hit dice.
wizard.noKitsAvailable: No kits available for the selected classes.
wizard.deityHint: Name of the deity your priest serves. Free choice — depends on the campaign world.
wizard.priesthoodDescription: Choose your cleric's faith. This determines spheres, abilities, and equipment recommendations.
wizard.genericClericDesc: Standard PHB spheres. No specific faith.
wizard.noPriesthoodForDruid: Druids have fixed sphere access and do not choose a faith.

sheet.name: Name
sheet.insufficientFunds: Not enough money! Short by {shortfall} GP.
sheet.kitArmorWarning: Kit armor restriction: {kitName} allows max AC {maxAC}
sheet.multiclassWizardArmor: Multiclass wizard: Cannot cast spells in armor (PHB)
sheet.multiclassThiefArmor: Multiclass thief: Thief abilities restricted in heavy armor (open locks + detect noise only)
sheet.changeRaceWarning: Ability score adjustments will be applied automatically.
sheet.xpDeleteConfirm: Delete this XP entry ({amount} XP)? The character's XP and level will be recalculated.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.magicItemCursedHint: Item cannot be removed without Remove Curse
equipment.magicAcBonusHint: AD&D 2e uses descending AC — better armor = lower number. Enter the bonus as a NEGATIVE number: Ring +1 → -1, Cloak +2 → -2, Bracers +3 → -3.
equipment.name: Name
equipment.magicalProtection: Magical protection (Bracers, Ring — doesn't count as armor)
equipment.confirmRemoveMessage: Do you really want to remove "{name}"?

spells.title: Spells
spells.learnSpellError: Failed to learn spell. You may not have permission to modify this character.
spells.name: Name
spells.allowedBooksHint: The DM decides which source books spells may come from.

proficiencies.title: Proficiencies
proficiencies.addLanguageError: Failed to add language. You may not have permission to modify this character.
proficiencies.confirmRemoveStyle: Do you really want to remove this fighting style?

sessions.title: The Chronicle of Chaos
sessions.noSessions: No sessions in the chronicle yet. Time to record your first adventure!
sessions.noEntries: No entries yet. Write the first one!
sessions.entryPlaceholder: What did your character experience? What were the key moments?
sessions.noCharactersHint: Create a character first to write an entry.
sessions.deleteMessage: Do you really want to permanently delete "{title}"? All entries will be lost.
sessions.deleteEntryMessage: Do you really want to delete this entry?
sessions.noParticipantsWarning: Add participants first before distributing XP.

dashboard.title: Party Dashboard
dashboard.noCharacters: No characters in the party yet.

import.title: Import Character Sheet
import.description: Upload photos or PDFs of an AD&D character sheet. The AI will extract the values automatically.
import.dropzone: Click here to select photos or PDFs
import.fileTooLarge: File "{name}" is too large (max. 10 MB per file).
import.totalTooLarge: Total size must not exceed 50 MB.
import.preciseMode: Precise scan (more accurate for handwritten sheets, slower)

chronicle.npcDeleteMessage: Really delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
chronicle.noQuotes: No quotes yet. Time for memorable moments!

avatar.dropzone: Drag image here or click to select

playMode.title: Play
playMode.restConfirmMessage: All expended spell slots and spell points will be restored.
playMode.kitArmorWarning: Kit armor restriction: {kitName} allows max AC {maxAC}
playMode.multiclassWizardArmor: Multiclass wizard: Cannot cast spells in armor (PHB)
playMode.multiclassThiefArmor: Multiclass thief: Thief abilities restricted in heavy armor (open locks + detect noise only)
playMode.saveFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
playMode.spellCastFailed: Failed to mark spell as expended.
playMode.thac0Tooltip: To Hit Armor Class 0. Roll d20 — result ≥ THAC0 − target AC = hit.
playMode.acTooltip: Armor Class. Lower is better protected.
playMode.savingThrowsTooltip: Saving throw — roll d20, result ≥ target = success.
playMode.paralyzationTooltip: Against paralysis, poison, and death magic.
playMode.rodTooltip: Against rod, staff, and wand effects.
playMode.breathTooltip: Against dragon breath and area effects.
playMode.perceptionTooltip: House rule: ⌊(INT + WIS) / 2⌋. Roll d20, result ≤ value = success.
playMode.backstabTooltip: Backstab damage multiplier on surprise attacks.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: An unexpected error occurred. This should not have happened.

epic.title: Epic Equipment
epic.fragilityChance: Fragility: {chance}% chance of a damage level on {trigger}
epic.electricDamage: 1 point of electrical damage per round
epic.saveVsDeath: Save vs. Death Magic each round
epic.bladesThrown: {count} blade(s) thrown — don't forget to collect!

rulebook.title: Rules & App Help
rulebook.placeholder: Ask about AD&D or the app...
rulebook.welcome: Greetings, adventurer! I know the AD&D 2nd Edition rulebooks by heart — and the Chaos Forge app too. Ask me about rules, monsters, combat tactics OR how to use the app.
rulebook.example1: What THAC0 does a Fighter have at level 5?
rulebook.example2: How do I attach a magic item to my character?
rulebook.example4: How do I distribute XP across the party?
rulebook.noAnswer: I found nothing matching in the rules or the app docs.
rulebook.error: Error with the query. Please try again.

party.title: Party Inventory
party.noItems: No loot in the pool yet.
party.insufficientGold: Not enough gold in the pool
party.itemCount: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {1 item} other {# items}}
party.noOwnItemsHint: You can only add items from your own characters.
party.equippedWarning: This item is currently equipped and will be unequipped automatically when moved.
party.addGoldNeedsCharacter: You need an active character to add gold to the pool.
party.insufficientCharacterGold: Your character doesn't have enough gold.

master.title: Master of Chaos
master.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
master.name: Name
master.noBookmarks: No bookmarks yet. Mark monsters, NPCs, or items with the star icon.
master.noMagicItems: No magic items in the catalog yet.
master.deleteMagicItemDesc: Really delete this magic item from the catalog?
master.monsterReferenceEntryTooltip: Reference entry with no combat stats — not combat-ready
master.combatSummaryTrivial: The party handles this fight effortlessly — the opposition poses no real threat.
master.combatSummaryEasy: The party has good odds of winning but shouldn't get careless.
master.combatSummaryModerate: A balanced fight — the outcome depends heavily on dice rolls and tactics.
master.combatSummaryHard: The opposition is a serious threat. Without good strategy and some luck, the party may fall.
master.combatSummaryDeadly: An extremely dangerous fight — the party faces overwhelming odds. Retreat may be the wiser choice.
master.combatSummaryQuick: The fight is decided quickly (avg {rounds} rounds).
master.combatSummaryPartyDominates: The party's damage output significantly outweighs the opposition.
master.combatSummaryOppositionDominates: The opposition deals significantly more damage than the party.
master.combatSummarySurvivors: On average, {count} party members survive the fight.
master.variantPickerSubtitle: Select the variants you want to import.
master.variantPickerParentChildDesc: the first variant becomes the parent monster, the rest are linked as sub-variants
master.variantPickerSeparateDesc: all variants are created as independent monsters

settings.title: Settings
settings.tutorialsHint: Resets all dismissed tutorial overlays. Next time you visit a page, its tutorial will start again.
settings.deleteHint: Permanently deletes your account and all associated data (profile, characters, notes).
settings.adminCantDelete: The admin account cannot be deleted via this dialog.
settings.deleteConfirm: Really delete your account and all data? This cannot be undone.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.userApproved: You have been approved — welcome to the chaos!

approval.pendingBanner: Minion Christoph must first accept your interest in joining the chaos.
approval.writeBlocked: You must be approved before you can make changes.
approval.approved: Welcome to the chaos — you have been approved!
approval.adminAlreadyApprovedMsg: This user is already approved. No action needed.
approval.adminRejectConfirm: Delete account of {email} permanently? This cannot be undone.

dashboard.welcomeDesc: This is your dashboard — the hub of your group. See all characters, stats and current activity at a glance.
dashboard.charactersDesc: Your heroes live here. Tap a card for details or create a new character up top.
dashboard.notificationsDesc: Received gold, new items, awarded XP — all land here. The bell glows red for unread messages.
dashboard.chatDesc: Questions about rules or the app? The chat in the More menu answers both — AD&D 2e rules straight from the books and anything about using Chaos Forge.

characters.welcomeDesc: Three modes are available: Manage, Play and Epic.
characters.modesDesc: Manage for calm upkeep, Play for the session, Epic for damage tiers and special items.
characters.chatDesc: The chat helps with THAC0, spell lists, Turn Undead and more. App questions are answered too — just ask.

party.welcomeDesc: The party shares gold and items. Everything is transparent to the whole group.
party.goldDesc: Platinum, Gold, Electrum, Silver, Copper. Add, distribute, remove — every transaction is logged.
party.itemsDesc: Found items land here before being distributed. The recipient gets a notification.
party.chatDesc: The chat in the More menu explains every party loot feature in detail.

chronicle.welcomeDesc: The group's story lives here — sessions, NPCs, quotes and XP.
chronicle.npcsDesc: Important people from your adventures — with image, tags and description. Perfect for lookup at their next appearance.
chronicle.quotesDesc: The best lines from the session — immortalised here. Ideal for throwback next time.
chronicle.chatDesc: The chat explains every chronicle feature and helps with rules for your current adventure.
